# Copilot Instructions for Bright Future International School Website

This Next.js project creates a modern, premium single-page school website with:

- Next.js App Router
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- Framer Motion for animations
- Responsive design
- Clean component architecture

## Project Structure
- `/app` - Next.js App Router pages
- `/components` - Reusable UI components
- `/public` - Static assets (images, icons)
- `/styles` - Global styles

## Development Guidelines
- Use functional components with TypeScript
- Follow Tailwind utility-first approach
- Implement smooth animations with Framer Motion
- Ensure mobile-first responsive design
- Use next/image for optimized images

## Components
- Navbar - Sticky navigation with smooth scroll
- Hero - Full-screen landing section
- About - School information with feature cards
- Gallery - Image gallery with hover effects
- Address - Branch locations with contact info
- Footer - Site footer with links and contact

## School Details
- Name: Bright Future International School
- Tagline: "Shaping Minds, Building Futures"
- Location: Patna, Bihar, India
- Three branches: Kankarbagh, Boring Road, Danapur
